# Brandscast

> Brandscast is an internal communication platform built on audio. Companies use it to share updates, training, culture and knowledge as private audio that employees can listen to from any podcast app — async, without more meetings or unread emails.

Audio is the channel. Brandscast supports two formats: podcasts (recurring series) and tracks (a finite, ordered series like a course). The length of each audio is up to you — from a one-minute update to a full episode. You don't need a studio or professional editing: recording and publishing is enough. Two AI tools do the production work — audio enhancement cleans up any recording in one click, and text to audio turns a document into a natural-sounding episode.

Every audio on Brandscast is private. Each member gets a secure, invite-only RSS feed they can open in their favourite podcast app (Apple Podcasts, Overcast, Pocket Casts, etc.) or in the web player. Admins control access per member and group, can revoke it instantly when someone leaves, and get listening analytics showing who listened, when, and from which device. There is no public discovery directory.

## Product

- [Home](https://brandscast.com/): Overview of Brandscast, value proposition, and pricing
- [Features](https://brandscast.com/features/): Index of everything Brandscast does
- [Tracks](https://brandscast.com/tracks/): The track format — a finite, ordered audio series (e.g. a course)
- [RSS Distribution](https://brandscast.com/rss-distribution/): How private authenticated RSS feeds work
- [Secure Access Control](https://brandscast.com/secure-access-control/): Member invite system and private feed security
- [Audio Enhancement](https://brandscast.com/audio-enhancement/): AI cleanup that improves recording quality automatically with one click
- [Text to Audio](https://brandscast.com/text-to-audio/): Turn a document, PDF or written update into a natural-sounding audio episode with AI
- [Employee Listening Analytics](https://brandscast.com/employee-listening-analytics/): Track who listened, when, and from which device
- [Employee Engagement Benchmarks](https://brandscast.com/employee-engagement-benchmarks/): How listening engagement compares across teams
- [MCP Connector](https://brandscast.com/mcp/): Connect Brandscast to Claude using the Model Context Protocol — manage podcasts, episodes, and members with natural language
- [Help Center](https://brandscast.com/help/): Tutorials and documentation for getting started and managing your account

## Use cases

- [Internal Communication](https://brandscast.com/internal-communication/): Replace recurring meetings and unread email threads with async audio updates
- [Audio Messages & Updates](https://brandscast.com/audio-messages-and-updates/): Short voice updates from leadership to the whole company
- [Leadership Updates](https://brandscast.com/leadership-updates/): CEO and executive messages delivered as private audio
- [HR Announcements](https://brandscast.com/hr-announcements/): Policy changes, benefits updates, and onboarding content
- [Employee Onboarding](https://brandscast.com/employee-onboarding/): Structured onboarding programmes in audio format
- [Training & Compliance](https://brandscast.com/training-and-compliance/): Ongoing training and regulatory compliance content
- [Company Culture](https://brandscast.com/company-culture/): Stories, values, and culture content shared as audio
- [Audiocourses](https://brandscast.com/audiocourses/): Internal learning courses delivered through audio
- [Sales Enablement](https://brandscast.com/sales-enablement/): Product updates and sales training for field teams
- [Podcasting for Remote Teams](https://brandscast.com/podcasting-for-remote-teams/): Async communication for distributed and remote workforces
- [Private Podcasts for Teams](https://brandscast.com/private-podcasts-for-teams/): Overview of the private audio model for teams
- [Private vs Public Podcasts](https://brandscast.com/private-vs-public-podcast/): Why internal communication needs private audio, not a public feed
- [AI Podcast Transcripts](https://brandscast.com/ai-podcast-transcripts/): Searchable transcripts for internal audio

## Pricing

Brandscast has three plans, billed monthly or yearly (yearly is cheaper). Prices shown are yearly / monthly:

- **Starter** — €29 / €39 per month. Up to 75 members, up to 3 account users, 60 minutes of AI tools (audio enhancement and text-to-audio), email support.
- **Growth** — €69 / €89 per month. Up to 250 members, up to 10 account users, 180 minutes of AI tools (audio enhancement and text-to-audio), email support.
- **Pro** — €119 / €149 per month. Up to 500 members, unlimited account users, 360 minutes of AI tools (audio enhancement and text-to-audio), priority support.

All plans include unlimited private podcasts and tracks, private authenticated feeds, and listening analytics. Every plan starts with a free 30-day trial. No credit card required to start.

## MCP Connector (API)

Brandscast exposes a Model Context Protocol (MCP) server at `mcp.brandscast.com`. It requires OAuth 2.0 authentication and a paid plan.

Available tools:
- `list_podcasts` — List all podcasts in the account
- `get_podcast` — Get details of a specific podcast
- `list_episodes` — List all episodes of a podcast
- `get_episode` — Get details of a specific episode
- `publish_episode` — Publish a draft episode
- `list_members` — List all members of a podcast
- `get_member` — Get details of a specific member
- `add_member` — Add a member to a podcast (creates member if not exists)
- `remove_member` — Remove a member from a podcast
- `get_stats` — Get download and listener statistics for a podcast or episode

OAuth scopes: `podcasts:read`, `members:read`, `members:write`, `analytics:read`
